title: News | Andy MacNae MP
meta_description: Keep updated on the latest news, campaigns and my work on behalf of voters in the local area.
text_excerpt: News | Andy MacNae MP >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 01254 476410 / 01706 489387 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS SAFER ROADS LINKS CONTACT LATEST NEWS Keep updated on the latest news, campaigns and my work on behalf of voters in the local area. Comments Box SVG icons Used for the like, share, comment, and reaction icons Andy MacNae MP 17 hours ago Great day out on the doorstep with the team #VoteLabour Out and about campaigning around Redvers Rd area for our fantastic candidate in Darwen East ward Councillor Martin Mccaughran. ... See More See Less View Comments likes Like love 31 Comments: 4 Shares: 1 Share Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Linked In Share by Email 4 Comments Comment on Facebook Andy MacNae MP 18 hours ago Fantastic visit to Sudell Primary School in Darwen 🏫 It is brilliant to see how the school continues to build on its success year after year, backed by the excellent support of Aldridge Education. During my visit, we had some highly productive discussions about a possible expansion of the school's offering, as well as how Darwen’s £20 million Pride in Place funding from central government will help level up and benefit our local community. 💷🏘️ The highlight of the day, however, was definitely facing the Year 6 students! They kept me firmly on my toes with some incredibly sharp and varied questions covering: 📚 SATs 👔 School uniforms 🎓 The wider education system ✈️ Term-time holidays It’s always a privilege to hear directly from our bright young minds—they certainly didn't hold back. A massive thank you to the staff and students at Sudell Primary for such a warm welcome. ... See More See Less View Comments likes Like love 15 Comments: 3 Shares: 2 Share Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Linked In Share by Email 3 Comments Comment on Facebook Andy MacNae MP 2 days ago Rossendale Hospice does outstanding work for families in our community during their most difficult times, but today's visit highlighted the immense financial pressure they are under. It is vital we step up to help. I have pledged my full support for local fundraising and will be actively backing Hospice UK’s national campaign for fair funding. Take a look at the Hospice UK campaign and see why this matters so much: www.hospiceuk.org/our-campaigns/fair-funding-for-hospices ... See More See Less View Comments likes Like love haha angry 53 Comments: 11 Shares: 8 Share Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Linked In Share by Email 11 Comments Comment on Facebook Andy MacNae MP 3 days ago I convened a roundtable of car insurers, including Aviva, Admiral and Confused.com, to discuss how we can encourage young drivers to drive safely and responsibly, which could in turn make insurance cheaper. Getting this right is vital, as although only 6% of all drivers are under the age of 25, they make up a quarter of all serious collisions. We will be sharing the findings directly with the Government. ... See More See Less View Comments likes Like love haha 38 Comments: 23 Shares: 4 Share Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Linked In Share by Email 23 Comments Comment on Facebook Andy MacNae MP 4 days ago Recent reporting has exposed Reform's deeply offensive, racist, and homophobic posts from their local candidate. Instead of suspending him, local party officials have defended this as "freedom of speech." Today, I wrote to the leadership of Reform to demand action. Racism, hatred against women and homophobia have no place in our community or our democracy. Read the full report from the Lancashire Telegraph : 🔗 www.lancashiretelegraph.co.uk/news/26040212.blackburn-reform-uk-candidate-offensive-posts-spark-row/ ...
